name: NeighbourGuard
descriptions: This turns every mobile into an emergency activation device for personal safety.
This service is designed to enhance personal safety by enabling quick emergency alerts via SMS, WhatsApp, and calls.
The service is integrated with a tenant registry for efficient emergency response management and neighbor coordination.
Our platform allows users to send alerts to designated responders within their tenant network.

features.title: Emergency Communication
features.text: Emergency alerts via SMS, WhatsApp, and calls. Fast and reliable communication for your safety in critical situations.

features.title: Flexible Response Network
features.text: Customizable responder lists that allow you to define who gets notified during an emergency, ensuring the right people respond quickly.

features.title: Multi-Language Support
features.text: Support for all 11 official South African languages, ensuring everyone can use the service in their preferred language for clear communication.

features.title: Tenant Management
features.text: Comprehensive tenant registry system that manages security groups, alarm systems, and responder networks for organized tenants.

emphasizes: tenant response and neighbor accountability for enhanced safety.
Quick activation during emergencies through simple mobile interactions.
Comprehensive security management for residential and commercial properties.
taglines: Your personal safety network at your fingertips.
When your circle becomes a life saver.
